about.title: Hi!
about.content:
I am a front-end developer specializing in JavaScript/TypeScript with extensive experience in React.js and Next.js. I build dynamic, responsive interfaces with a strong focus on performance and user experience.

 I’m a proactive, continuous learner passionate about turning ideas into real-world solutions. I thrive in collaborative environments and consistently contribute value through teamwork, ownership, and problem-solving. 

 My background in design gives me a keen eye for pixel-perfect implementation and a deep understanding of UI/UX principles. I excel at translating design visions into engaging, accessible digital experiences—applying mobile-first development, strong SEO practices, and accessibility standards from the ground up. 

 My expertise extends to the back-end, where I architect and maintain scalable solutions using Nest.js, Prisma ORM, and PostgreSQL. I am also proficient in the Web3 ecosystem, with hands-on experience interacting with smart contracts using WAGMI and querying on-chain data via Alchemy.

 My core focus is on delivering end-to-end technological solutions that prioritize efficiency, innovation, and a seamless user journey from database to interface.

content.name: Ervin Mamutov
content.role: Senior Software Engineer co-worker at KLKTN
content.comment:
Daniel is one of the most talented and dedicated people I’ve ever worked with. Watching him grow from a graphic designer into a highly skilled engineer in just three years was incredible. It really shows his discipline, hard work, and natural talent. 

 What truly sets Daniel apart is his approach to teamwork. He’s always the first to step up, no matter the task, and consistently delivers thoughtful, precise, and well-rounded solutions. He has a great sense for making sure his work is both user-friendly and robust. Beyond that, he brings so much positivity and energy to the team—it’s impossible to overstate how much better he makes the work environment. 

 Any team would be lucky to have Daniel. He’s not just talented; he’s the kind of teammate who makes everyone around him better.

content.name: Fabien Allanic
content.comment:
I had the pleasure to manage Daniel for a few years at KLKTN. 

 Daniel is not only talented and good at what he does, but he also embodies what I love to see in each engineer: being proactive with things, lead by example, willing to learn and grow, and is always up for a challenge. 

 He has delivered excellent work, and rose up to the occasion on many circumstances to fill any gap we had, and deliver high quality code while meeting our deadlines. 

 He is great to collaborate with, a fast learner, and was greatly appreciated by all of his teammates. 

 I highly recommend Daniel!

projects.title: Software Dashboard
projects.content: Designed and Implement a software Dashboard screen for existing solution as away to modernize a legacy technology software utilizing pure Javascript, Html and CSS (LESS)
